texto: Struggle is the meaning of life
autor: defeat or victory is in the hands of God. But struggle itself is man’s duty and should be his joy.
explicacao: Citação de defeat or victory is in the hands of God. But struggle itself is man’s duty and should be his joy. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Struggle is the meaning of life” articula reflexao, sir-sultan-muhammad-shah-aga-khan-iii, struggle em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
